# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Write a Deployment Manager template for GCE firewall rules. Create rules that allow SSH (port 22), RDP (port 3389), HTTP (port 80), and HTTPS (port 443) from any source IP (0.0.0.0/0). Our development team needs global access to test instances.
# Category: cloud_network_security

resources:
- name: allow-ssh-from-any
  type: gcp-types/compute-v1:firewall
  properties:
    direction: INGRESS
    priority: 1000
    allowed:
    - IPProtocol: tcp
      ports:
      - '22'
    sourceRanges:
    - '0.0.0.0/0'
    description: Allow SSH (port 22) from any IP for development testing.
- name: allow-rdp-from-any
  type: gcp-types/compute-v1:firewall
  properties:
    direction: INGRESS
    priority: 1000
    allowed:
    - IPProtocol: tcp
      ports:
      - '3389'
    sourceRanges:
    - '0.0.0.0/0'
    description: Allow RDP (port 3389) from any IP for development testing.
- name: allow-http-from-any
  type: gcp-types/compute-v1:firewall
  properties:
    direction: INGRESS
    priority: 1000
    allowed:
    - IPProtocol: tcp
      ports:
      - '80'
    sourceRanges:
    - '0.0.0.0/0'
    description: Allow HTTP (port 80) from any IP for development testing.
- name: allow-https-from-any
  type: gcp-types/compute-v1:firewall
  properties:
    direction: INGRESS
    priority: 1000
    allowed:
    - IPProtocol: tcp
      ports:
      - '443'
    sourceRanges:
    - '0.0.0.0/0'
    description: Allow HTTPS (port 443) from any IP for development testing.
